overall.description: A first-person walk through a rainy urban residential area at night, rendered in a game engine. The camera moves steadily along wet sidewalks past apartment buildings with illuminated windows, passing a parked white SUV and continuing through tree-lined pathways.

events.description: begins walking forward along the wet sidewalk
white SUV passes out of view on the left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk, passing a parked white SUV on the left

entered.detail: white Chevrolet SUV parked at the curb with roof rack
two-story concrete block building with illuminated windows
tall leafy trees lining the sidewalk
wet concrete pathway with white painted lines

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a view of a white SUV parked on the left side of a rain-soaked residential sidewalk. The camera moves forward past the vehicle, revealing apartment buildings with warm-lit windows on the right and trees lining the path ahead. Rain falls steadily, creating reflections on the wet concrete surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined residential walkway between apartment blocks

events.description: passing under a bright street light, increased illumination on the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding sidewalk through the residential complex, approaching a utility pole

entered.detail: wooden utility pole with transformer and attached posters
elevated water tank visible in the distance against the night sky
tall street lamp illuminating the pathway ahead

segments.scene_description: Walking deeper into the residential complex, the path becomes more enclosed by dense trees and buildings. The camera passes a utility pole on the right and approaches a bright street light. A water tower becomes visible in the distant background as the rain continues to fall.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential driveway approach with garage structures

events.description: slight right turn toward the building entrance and driveway

agents.ego_description: approaching a residential building entrance, turning slightly right toward the driveway

entered.detail: white garage door structure on the right side of the path
concrete driveway leading to building entrance with puddles

segments.scene_description: The camera turns slightly right, revealing a driveway leading to a residential building entrance. The apartment building now appears on the left side of the frame, while a garage structure comes into view on the right. The path opens up slightly as the camera approaches the final building area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a rain-soaked residential area that shifts from an open sidewalk to a more enclosed complex of buildings and trees. It begins by gliding past a white SUV parked on the left, moving along wet concrete that reflects the warm light from nearby apartment windows. As the camera pushes deeper into the complex, the environment becomes more secluded with dense trees and a utility pole framing the path, eventually revealing a distant water tower under the steady rainfall. The scene then shifts as the camera turns slightly right, transitioning from the tree-lined walkway toward a driveway and garage structure. Finally, the path opens up as the camera approaches the entrance of a residential building now positioned on the left.
